Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: bridges by function [300007877], bridges (built works) [300007836], transportation structures by form [300007835], transportation structures [300120693], single built works by function [300004894], single built works by specific type [300004795], single built works (built environment) [300004790], Single Built Works (hierarchy name) [300004789], Built Environment (hierarchy name) [300264550], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: stress ribbon bridges [300263542], bridges by construction [300122151], bridges (built works) [300007836], transportation structures by form [300007835], transportation structures [300120693], single built works by function [300004894], single built works by specific type [300004795], single built works (built environment) [300004790], Single Built Works (hierarchy name) [300004789], Built Environment (hierarchy name) [300264550], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Generally narrow bridges for people and animals to cross on foot.
Designa generalmente un puente estrecho para que las personas y los animales lo crucen a pie.
Wordt gebruikt voor meestal smalle bruggetjes die mensen en dieren te voet kunnen oversteken.
通常為窄小的橋，供人與動物步行通過。
In der Regel eine schmale Brücke, die Mensch und Tier nur zu Fuß überqueren können.
Geralmente, pontes estreitas para pessoas e animais atravessarem a pé.

Source.Source_ID: 2000039651/Canadian Thesaurus of Construction Science and Technology (1978)
